name: Notification
visual_summary: A pop-up notification can be displayed to inform the user about a specific action or event. It can have a variety of icons, messages, and alert types. This component is typically used to grab the user's attention and notify them of something important.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Notification
Description: A pop-up notification can be displayed to inform the user about a specific action or event. It can have a variety of icons, messages, and alert types. This component is typically used to grab the user's attention and notify them of something important.
Style: flat, rounded, animated
Interactions: dismissable, auto-hiding, clickable
Tags: notification, popup, alert

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// packages/@mantine/core/src/components/Notification/index.ts
import type {
  NotificationCssVariables,
  NotificationFactory,
  NotificationProps,
  NotificationStylesNames,
} from './Notification';

export { Notification } from './Notification';

export type {
  NotificationProps,
  NotificationStylesNames,
  NotificationFactory,
  NotificationCssVariables,
};
